creator: alexey@ocaml.nl
text:
Hello,

I have 14.0-RELEASE-p4 running in VirtualBox.

When I enter "reboot" as a normal user (me) I see "reboot: Operation not permitted".

- I am a member of the "operator" (and "wheel") group.
- "shutdown -r now" works as the very same user.
- As root, "reboot" works.
- The very same things happen with "halt" (operation not permitted) and "shutdown -h now" (works).
- "poweroff" works.

What am I doing wrong?
